response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:32: Performer Shiranui Flare introduces her "Birthday Festival 2026" event, discussing BEMANI music. 2. 02:32-05:01: Vocal performance of 'Pink Rose'. On-screen text identified 'Pink Rose', lyricist/composer 'Kiyomi Kumano', and arranger/composer 'Seiya Murai'. 3. Search query 'Pink Rose くまのきよみ lyrics' confirmed the song title, artists, and lyrics. 4. Compiled lyrics and translated for reference_lyrics_en. 5. Mapped scenes to timestamps and structured JSON output.
response.global_summary: This video features a VTuber, Shiranui Flare, hosting her "Birthday Festival 2026." She spends the first part of the video introducing the stream, talking about the event, and mentioning her appreciation for BEMANI music. Following the introduction, she performs the song "Pink Rose" (originally by Kiyomi Kumano and Seiya Murai), accompanied by another avatar. The video ends at the conclusion of the song.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare introduces her "Birthday Festival 2026" event, talks about her excitement, and mentions BEMANI music. No vocal music is present.
Shiranui Flare performs the vocal song 'Pink Rose', composed by Kiyomi Kumano and Seiya Murai. The performance includes choreography.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ナカナイデ
本当の孤独も知らない
まだ淡い花びらに
涙の粒 抱えたまま

ah さわらないで
暖かなその手は
あたしのすべて狂わす
ne 許さないで
傷口を押さえて
微笑んでる あなたがいる
もう 帰れないね

落ちてく時の甘い香り
繰り返すたびにひどくなる

ダキシメテ
いまだけ好きだってフリして
たったひとつだけなら
ぜんぶ ぜんぶ いらない

ナカナイデ
本当の孤独も知らない
まだ淡い花びらに
涙の粒 抱えたまま

ah 急がないで
真実なんか ほら
どこにも落ちてないでしょ
ne 見つめないで

憎んでいる? 求めている?

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Don't cry
You don't even know true loneliness
While still holding
Tears in the pale petals

ah, don't touch me
Those warm hands
Drive everything about me crazy
ne, don't forgive me
Pressing on the wound
You are there, smiling
I can't go back now, can I?

The sweet scent of falling time
Becomes worse with each repetition

Hold me
Just for now, pretend you love me
If it's just one thing
I don't need everything, everything

Don't cry
You don't even know true loneliness
While still holding
Tears in the pale petals

ah, don't hurry
Look, the truth
Isn't lying anywhere, is it?
ne, don't look at me
With that gentle gaze
Do you hate me? Are you wanting me?
I don't understand anymore

My face when we kiss
